listingMetadata.hubDescription: Studio OS migration applied. VaultSparked Discord role live.
listingMetadata.canonicalSummary: Studio website and Vault Member portal. Auth, rank system, points economy, classified lore, Discord role sync, Stripe subscriptions, admin panel.

pulse.currentFocus: Session 87 closed (recovery writeback at S88 start). All S86 carry-forward items cleared. Live now: repo-wide lint gate (lint-repo.mjs catches conflict markers + committed secrets pre-push); voice-leak patrol complete (trust-depth.js + adaptive-cta.js scrubbed of internal enum/signal language); Voidfall lore-gate fragments live (rank-2 + rank-4 on /universe/voidfall/); studio-pulse-live.js broadcasts to vault:events on real shipments; all 8 game pages emit VideoGame JSON-LD via schema-injector; native-feel + ignis-lens + schema-injector propagated site-wide to 105 HTML files; all 79 public-page og:image tags now point at the dynamic /_og/ worker with per-page title/eyebrow/status. Full S86 runtime stack still live: ask-ignis + Vault Oracle + IGNIS Lens; edge-gate + rate-limit + nonce CSP + /_csrf on Cloudflare Worker; og-image-worker on /_og/* zone route.
pulse.nextMilestone: Founder actions outstanding: (1) Revoke compromised classic PAT at github.com/settings/tokens (exposure closure only). (2) Add Workers KV Storage:Edit + Zone:Workers Routes:Edit to scoped CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN. Agent-doable next: (1) Watch Lighthouse + playwright-axe after 105-page script injection to verify budgets hold. (2) Social Dashboard bidirectional mirror (cross-repo). (3) Decision on nav rename Studio Pulse → Forge Window.
blockers: MANUAL: revoke compromised classic PAT at github.com/settings/tokens (exposure occurred in agent transcript during token extraction; workflow secret already rotated off it, revocation is pure cleanup)

CF API token (scoped) lacks Workers KV Storage:Edit + Zone:Workers Routes:Edit — working around via CLOUDFLARE_EMAIL + CLOUDFLARE_API_KEY (Global API Key). Long-term: add those two scopes to the scoped token.
Annual Stripe plan keys still do not exist, so annual checkout remains an honest preview only

now: [GENIUS][INTELLIGENCE] Vault Intent Graph — DONE S75: shipped `assets/intent-state.js` and rewired pathways, adaptive CTAs, related rails, and funnel payloads to read one shared visitor-state model instead of maintaining separate intent logic.

[GENIUS][FEEDBACK] Conversion Telemetry Matrix — DONE S75: expanded telemetry with pathway-aware/stage-aware payload fields and shipped a visible telemetry matrix surface on `/`, `/membership/`, and `/vaultsparked/` so the current journey read and best-next-move are explicit.

[GENIUS][CONVERSION] Trust Depth Layer — DONE S75: added reusable trust-depth modules on `/`, `/membership/`, and `/vaultsparked/` covering proof, next-step framing, hesitation handling, and founder-promise language.

[GENIUS][COHESION] Vault Network Spine — DONE S75: added a shared `assets/network-spine.js` surface on homepage, membership, VaultSparked, and Studio Pulse so website, GitHub, Studio Hub/social-dashboard bridge state, and pulse surfaces now read as one network.
next: [SIL:2⛔] Genius Hit List as scheduled audit — keep running the ranked combined-audit pass periodically so the website does not slip back into piecemeal iteration.

[GENIUS][CONVERSION] Extend proof/depth beyond the three core pages — carry the stronger trust language into join/invite or other high-intent public entry routes if the next session stays conversion-focused.
[GENIUS][COHESION] Extend gravity onto the `/games/` and `/universe/` hubs — the per-world pages now hand off properly, but the main collection hubs can still become stronger route orchestrators.
[OPS] Annual Stripe activation once keys exist — replace the annual placeholder path only after the real Stripe annual plan keys are created.
[OPS] CF Worker automation unblock — add `CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN` so Worker deploys stop depending on local Wrangler auth.
